description: Has foundational knowledge and can perform basic tasks with guidance.
exampleCriteria: Understands core concepts; can follow tutorials and documentation to complete simple tasks; requires regular support from more experienced colleagues.

description: Can work independently on standard tasks and is developing deeper expertise.
exampleCriteria: Applies skills on real projects with occasional guidance; familiar with common patterns and best practices; can troubleshoot standard issues independently.

description: Consistently delivers high-quality work and can lead others in this area.
exampleCriteria: Designs and implements complex solutions independently; mentors junior team members; reviews others' work; contributes to best practices and team standards.

description: Recognised authority with deep mastery; drives innovation and strategic decisions.
exampleCriteria: Sets architectural direction; speaks or publishes externally; defines standards across the organisation; solves novel, high-complexity problems others cannot.
